deliverables.notes: Five-sheet workbook with source packet, calculations, final decision table, assumptions, and validation checks.

notes: Built with a standard-library OOXML writer because @oai/artifact-tool and openpyxl were unavailable in this environment.
Workbook formulas and cached values are populated directly from the embedded packet; no external data lookup was used.

validation.check: XLSX package structure and required parts
Key row/value citations and query outcomes
No bad formula markers in XML scan
